context: Tests whether the SharePlay activities skill corrects common collaborative app synchronization mistakes.

checklist.name: Retained session owner
checklist.description: Moves sessions() observation out of a recreated SwiftUI view task and into a retained manager or model object.

checklist.name: Unreliable ephemeral updates
checklist.description: Uses unreliable GroupSessionMessenger delivery for high-frequency ephemeral stroke, cursor, or pointer updates.

checklist.name: Reliable durable commands
checklist.description: Uses reliable GroupSessionMessenger delivery for durable state-changing commands such as clear canvas, selections, or mode changes.

checklist.name: Messenger size limit
checklist.description: States that messenger payloads should stay under 256 KB and should not carry large image or file data.

checklist.name: Journal attachments
checklist.description: Uses GroupSessionJournal for larger non-time-sensitive attachments and notes Transferable item requirements.

checklist.name: Journal size limit
checklist.description: Mentions the 100 MB GroupSessionJournal attachment limit and recommends server storage or file transfer for larger or protected assets.

checklist.name: Late joiner state
checklist.description: Handles late joiners by detecting new participants and sending a full state snapshot or equivalent canonical state.

checklist.name: Cleanup lifecycle
checklist.description: Includes leave/end and task cleanup so abandoned sessions and message listeners do not leak.
